params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a down-up counter with a 3-bit output and a carry-out signal. It decrements when the up_down input is high and increments when it is low. Upon reaching the minimum value of 0 (000 in binary), it wraps around to 7 and sets the carry_out signal to high. Conversely, when incrementing, if it reaches 7 (111 in binary), it wraps around to 0 and also sets carry_out high. A reset input initializes the counter to 7 and clears the carry_out signal.
